signout.label: Logout
signout.success: You have been logged out successfully.
signout.error: An error occurred while logging out. Please try again.

signin.title: Sign In
signin.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign Up

signin.error: An error occurred while signing in. Please check your credentials and try again.

signup.title: Sign Up

account.title: Account Information
account.account_desc: Create your account by filling in the information below.

personal.title: Personal Information
personal.desc: Provide some personal details to complete your profile.

profile.title: Profile
profile.desc: Tell us more about you to personalize your experience.
profile.bioPlaceholder: Tell us a bit about yourself

security.title: Security
security.desc: Choose a strong password to protect your account.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.desc: Please read and accept our Terms and Conditions to proceed.
terms.acceptTerms: I have read and accept the Terms and Conditions

signup.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign In
signup.error: Failed to create account. Please try again.

error.email: Please enter a valid email address
error.string: This field must be a string
error.number: This field must be a number
error.date: This field must be a valid date
error.boolean: This field must be true or false
error.phone: Please enter a valid phone number in E.164 format
error.mustAcceptTerms: You must accept the terms and conditions
error.password_uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
error.password_lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
error.password_number: Password must contain at least one number
error.password_special: Password must contain at least one special character
error.internal_server_error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
error.age_restriction: You must be at least 13 years old to register
error.invalid_credentials: Invalid credentials. Please verify your information and try again.
